name: pedit
description: Pedit is an in-development Codex plugin for visual editing workflows. Aliases: @pedit, @Pedit. When invoked from the composer, open the Pedit canvas immediately in the Codex sidebar with pedit_open_canvas.

interface.shortDescription: Open a visual image-editing canvas in Codex.
interface.longDescription: Pedit provides a local MCP bridge for visual image-editing workflows. When the user invokes @Pedit or asks to use Pedit, immediately call pedit_open_canvas and open the returned canvasUrl in the Codex sidebar in-app browser. Then operate upload, view, edit, version graph, export, and generation task workflows from the canvas.
defaultPrompt: Open the Pedit canvas in the sidebar
